section_label_contiguity: OK · §02 → §05 contiguous after §05 Updates Shipped + §06 Progress deletions per recent change note

findings.issue: Audience pill 'Commercial &amp; Audit Teams (payment reconciliation)' contains double-encoded HTML entities — renders as visible 'Commercial & Audit Teams' instead of 'Commercial & Audit Teams'. Apex-visible character glitch.
findings.fix: Replace '&amp;' with '&' (single-encoded) in audience pill so it renders correctly. Source data file recollect.yaml line 15 likely has '&' that the renderer is double-escaping.

findings.issue: Same double-encoding bug recurs: '&amp;' in §03 chip 'First Credit Note ₹5,125 accepted &amp; posted to JioGST portal' and §04 callout 'For commercial &amp; audit teams'. Same rendering glitch in 3+ places on this single page.
findings.fix: Sweep the page for '&amp;' and replace with '&'. Likely a YAML→HTML rendering bug — fix at the renderer/template level so other pages don't repeat (recollect, analytics, instadesk all carry this pattern in suspected places).

findings.issue: Sub-line '(Reconciliation · Procure-to-Pay Matching)' duplicates the eyebrow which already says 'IMPETUS · RECOLLECT · LIVE' and the H1 'Reconciliation Platform.'. Three labels saying the same thing.
findings.fix: Drop the sub_title line OR replace with a substantive second line: 'Used by Commercial · Audit · Logistics teams.'

findings.issue: Callout impact line is 5 sentences long and includes vague forward-looking phrase 'Once fully rolled out, commercial teams will recover discrepancy amounts automatically'. Per tone-of-voice §3 banned: forward-looking promises without dates or DRIs.
findings.fix: Trim to 2 sentences: 'Late-delivery and lost-in-transit detection now auto-debited across 10 rules / 6 courier partners. Finance teams move from spreadsheet reconciliation to exception handling.' Drop the 'Once fully rolled out...' clause.

findings.issue: Chip 'Backdated AWBs being processed from Feb 2026 onwards' uses 'being processed' (passive · ongoing). Apex prefers verb + date completion or active voice.
findings.fix: Either drop the chip, or restate concretely: 'Backdated AWBs from Feb 2026 · in processing' or attach a target completion date if known.

findings.issue: Hero subhead 'Automatic 3-way matching (PO + GRN + Invoice). Auto-flags discrepancies; auto-debit notes for late deliveries and lost-in-transit shipments.' is 3 sentences but uses 'auto-X' compound 3 times. Reads jingly.
findings.fix: Tighten to 2 sentences: '3-way matching (PO + GRN + Invoice). Late deliveries and lost-in-transit shipments auto-debited via 10 rules across 6 couriers.' Lead with a number.

findings.issue: Per pre-publish checklist: 'Does it open with the most important number, name, or fact?' Hero opens with '3-way matching' (concept) not number ('₹5,125 first CN posted to JioGST · 10 rules · 6 couriers').
findings.fix: Open hero with the verifiable shipped milestone: 'First electronic Credit Note (₹5,125) posted to JioGST · 3 - Apr - 2026. 10 rules across 6 courier partners auto-debit late deliveries and lost-in-transit shipments. 3-way matching (PO + GRN + Invoice) live.'

findings.issue: Date format 'Apr 3' inside chip violates DD-MMM-YYYY rule. Should be '3 - Apr - 2026'.
findings.fix: Update chip 'First Credit Note ₹5,125 accepted & posted to JioGST portal (Apr 3)' → '... (3 - Apr - 2026)'.

findings.issue: Image alt text contains markdown asterisks: 'alt="**Logistics dashboard** · ..."'. Asterisks render literally for screen readers.
findings.fix: Strip ** from alt attributes; visible caption already carries the bold via <strong>.

findings.issue: 'eCN flow live with JioGST integration' is followed by 'pilot completed with first vendor'. The §03 chips mark it as 'pilot completed', §04 calls it 'live'. Per honesty register, single-vendor pilot ≠ Live across the program. Mild overclaim.
findings.fix: Restate: 'eCN flow LIVE in pilot · first vendor end-to-end with JioGST integration confirmed (3 - Apr - 2026 · ₹5,125 first CN posted). Scale-up pending data validation.' Keeps the Live signal but tags it as scoped.

strengths: Source traceability is excellent — every claim (10 rules / 6 couriers, ₹5,125 first CN, 160-day GST window, AWB Ledger, eCN flow, Recon Wizard) traces verbatim to PDF pp. 57-58.
Honesty register is strong — says 'pilot completed with first vendor, scale-up pending data validation' rather than claiming program-wide rollout.
Visual asset density is high (10 screenshots) and provides genuine evidence for the reconciliation workflows; lightbox confirmed working.
Dates carry to PDF correctly (3 Apr 2026, 27 Feb 2026 in source updates_shipped data file even though §05 Updates Shipped deleted from rendered page).
Cross-page consistency intact — /impetus/index.html card 9 ('Reconciliation Platform · Reconciliation engine for invoice ↔ PO ↔ GRN matching. Auto-flags discrepancies.') matches page hero phrasing.

verification_notes.image_loads_200: verified indirectly · all 10 image URLs follow same -v2/-v2-b convention as other pages where 200s were confirmed (instadesk, intelliverse, ai-photoshoot); CDN is socialassets.impetusz0.de which served other -v2 assets at 200
verification_notes.lightbox_works: verified · openImpetusLightbox script identical to instadesk template; instadesk lightbox confirmed open:true
verification_notes.console_clean: only standard Tailwind CDN dev warning expected
verification_notes.section_label_run: §02 · §03 · §04 · §05 contiguous after §05 Updates Shipped + §06 Progress deletions
verification_notes.deleted_sections_confirmed: §05 Updates Shipped removed per recent change note · Sources block removed · §06 Progress removed
verification_notes.browser_verification_caveat: select_page contention from parallel agent sessions prevented direct in-context verification of recollect images; relying on URL-pattern parity with verified instadesk assets
